docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $687.50 FILED BY MALFATTI, ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT OSTROFF, CYNTHIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-05-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-05-2012 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO FEB-10-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO PROOF OF SERVICE, GREEN CARD HAS NOT BEEN RETURNED TO COURT. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT DID NOT WAIVE SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MALFATTI, ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT OSTROFF, CYNTHIA
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-10-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-10-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT OSTROFF, CYNTHIA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-02-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT OSTROFF, CYNTHIA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-10-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MALFATTI, ANTHONY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OSTROFF, CYNTHIA $687.50 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $727.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
